findings.root_cause: Casa Rosario video existed in project_videos but had no deal attachment (property_id/project_id did not match jv_deals.id 'casa-rosario-001'), so the canonical home-feed excluded it.
findings.backend_fix: Added title-based fallback matching in handlePlatformHomeFeed so a video whose title contains a deal name is attached to that deal. This is backend-only; no schema or S3 write required.
findings.android_fix: Added Tokenized / JV Deal / Buyer investment-option icon chips to the DealVideoCard, mirroring the iOS ProjectReelsView.
findings.ios_status: ProjectReelsViewModel already performs title-based matching, so iOS Project Reels now sync Casa Rosario automatically from the same feed.
findings.landing_status: ivxholding-landing/ivx-home-feed.js consumes the same /api/ivx/video-platform/home-feed endpoint, so the landing page also shows the video without redeploy.

build_status.expo_runchecks: false positive on backend/hono.ts missing (file exists; TypeScript error fixed)
